name: Shrimp Mini Quiches
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon dried dill -- OR to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Combine cream cheese and butter until smooth.
3. Add flour and mix well.
4. Shape dough into 30 1-inch balls.
5. Place in lightly greased mini muffin tins. Shape into shells.
6. Prick bottom and sides with a fork.
7. Bake at 400 degrees for 5 minutes.
8. Let cool in pan on a wire rack.
9. Prepare filling:
a. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
b. Place one shrimp in each shell.
c. Combine egg, cream, brandy, salt, pepper, and dill.
d. Divide evenly among shells, about 2 teaspoons each.
e. Slice cheese into 30 small triangles and place one on each appetizer.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or until set.
Freezing directions:
Cool. Remove from tins. Freeze in foil. To reheat, place quiches on a baking sheet. Bake at 375 degrees for 7-10 minutes.
